text:
Perfect! All changes completed successfully:

## Summary of Changes:

### 1. **Removed "gtool" Text**
- Removed the "gtool" heading from the header in RelaySwap.tsx
- Set appName to empty string in App.tsx

### 2. **Made Chain Badge Clickable with Logo**
- Converted the static chain badge into a clickable button
- Added chain logo/icon to the button (displays next to chain name)
- Clicking the button cycles through available chains and switches to the next one
- Shows a ChevronDown icon to indicate it's clickable
- Displays success/error toasts when switching chains
- The button shows the current connected chain with its logo

Now the header is clean without any app name, and users can click on the chain badge to switch between different chains. The chain logo is displayed alongside the chain name for better visual identification.
